# meddecide

**Medical Decision Analysis and Reliability Assessment Tools for
Clinical Research**

## Abstract

`meddecide` is a comprehensive R package and jamovi module that bridges
the gap between complex statistical methodology and practical clinical
research. It provides an intuitive toolkit for medical professionals and
researchers to perform diagnostic test evaluations, reliability
assessments, and evidence-based decision analyses without requiring
extensive programming knowledge. By offering both a traditional R
interface and a user-friendly jamovi GUI, the package democratizes
access to advanced statistical methods essential for modern medical
research and clinical decision-making.

## Overview

The `meddecide` package serves as the computational engine for the
ClinicoPath jamovi Module, offering dual functionality:

- **As an R Package**: Direct access to all functions through R scripts
  and console
- **As a jamovi Module**: Point-and-click interface for statistical
  analyses without coding

See full documentation at
<https://sbalci.github.io/ClinicoPathJamoviModule/>

[![CRAN
Status](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/meddecide)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=meddecide)

Research](https://img.shields.io/badge/Domain-Clinical%20Research-darkblue.svg)](https://github.com/sbalci/meddecide)

## Key Features

### 🏥 Medical Decision Analysis

- **Diagnostic Test Evaluation**: Calculate sensitivity, specificity,
  predictive values, and likelihood ratios
- **Test Comparison**: Compare multiple diagnostic tests against a gold
  standard with statistical significance testing
- **Test Combination**: Systematically evaluate all possible patterns
  from 2-3 diagnostic tests to identify optimal strategies
- **Decision Calculator**: Interactive tool for exploring how test
  characteristics affect clinical decisions
- **Co-Testing Analysis**: Analyze combined results of concurrent
  diagnostic tests (parallel strategies)
- **Sequential Testing**: Evaluate serial testing strategies
  (confirmation and exclusion approaches)
- **Bayesian Updates**: Fagan nomograms for visualizing post-test
  probability calculations

### 📊 ROC Analysis

- **ROC Curve Generation**: Create and visualize receiver operating
  characteristic curves
- **AUC Calculation**: Compute area under the curve with confidence
  intervals
- **Optimal Cutpoint Detection**: Determine best thresholds using
  various optimization methods
- **Multiple Comparison**: Compare ROC curves from different diagnostic
  tests

### 🤝 Reliability Assessment

- **Cohen’s Kappa**: Calculate inter-rater agreement for two raters
- **Fleiss’ Kappa**: Assess agreement among multiple raters
- **Weighted Kappa**: Account for ordinal data with custom weighting
  schemes
- **Agreement Visualization**: Generate plots to visualize rater
  concordance patterns

### 📐 Sample Size Calculations

- **Power-Based**: Determine sample size for desired statistical power
- **Precision-Based**: Calculate sample size for confidence interval
  width
- **Fixed N Analysis**: Evaluate achievable power with predetermined
  sample size
- **Multiple Scenarios**: Compare sample size requirements across
  different study designs

### 🔬 Advanced Analysis

- **No Gold Standard**: Analyze diagnostic tests when reference standard
  is imperfect
- **Latent Class Analysis**: Estimate test performance without gold
  standard
- **Bootstrap Methods**: Generate robust confidence intervals
- **Missing Data Handling**: Appropriate methods for incomplete datasets

### 📈 Visualization Tools

- **Fagan Nomograms**: Interactive Bayesian probability calculators for
  sequential testing
- **Forest Plots**: Compare diagnostic metrics across studies with
  confidence intervals
- **Agreement Plots**: Visualize inter-rater reliability patterns
- **ROC Space**: Multi-test comparison in ROC coordinate system
- **Radar Plots**: Comprehensive multi-metric test comparison
  visualization
- **Heatmaps**: Color-coded performance matrices for test combinations
- **Decision Trees**: Hierarchical visualization of test combination
  strategies
- **Comparison Bar Charts**: Side-by-side performance metric comparisons

## Installation

### As an R Package

``` r

# Install from GitHub
devtools::install_github("sbalci/meddecide")

# Load the package
library(meddecide)
```

### As a jamovi Module

1.  Open jamovi (\>= 1.8.1)
2.  Click the modules menu (⋮) in the top right
3.  Select “jamovi library”
4.  Search for “ClinicoPath”
5.  Click Install

## Quick Start Examples

### Basic Diagnostic Test Evaluation

``` r

library(meddecide)

# Single test evaluation
result <- decision(
  data = histopathology,
  gold = "Golden Standart",
  goldPositive = "1",
  newtest = "New Test",
  testPositive = "1"
)
```

### Compare Multiple Tests

``` r

# Compare two diagnostic tests
comparison <- decisioncompare(
  data = histopathology,
  gold = "Golden Standart",
  goldPositive = "1",
  test1 = "New Test",
  test1Positive = "1",
  test2 = "Rater 1",
  test2Positive = "1",
  ci = TRUE,
  plot = TRUE,
  statComp = TRUE
)
```

### Evaluate Test Combinations

``` r

# Analyze all possible patterns from 2 tests
combinations <- decisioncombine(
  data = histopathology,
  gold = "Golden Standart",
  goldPositive = "1",
  test1 = "New Test",
  test1Positive = "1",
  test2 = "Rater 1",
  test2Positive = "1",
  showIndividual = TRUE,
  showHeatmap = TRUE,
  showRecommendation = TRUE
)
```

### Sequential Testing Analysis

``` r

# Evaluate serial testing strategies
sequential <- sequentialtests(
  data = histopathology,
  gold = "Golden Standart",
  goldPositive = "1",
  test1 = "New Test",
  test1Positive = "1",
  test2 = "Rater 1",
  test2Positive = "1",
  showFagan = TRUE
)
```

### ROC Analysis

``` r

# ROC curve with optimal cutpoint
roc_result <- psychopdaROC(
  data = biomarker_data,
  class = "diagnosis",
  value = "biomarker_level"
)
```

### Interrater Reliability

``` r

# Cohen's Kappa for two raters
agreement_result <- agreement(
  data = rating_data
)
```

## Example Datasets

Small CSV files are provided in `inst/extdata` to illustrate the main
functions:

- `decision_example.csv`: Basic medical decision analysis
- `roc_example.csv`: ROC curve analysis
- `agreement_example.csv`: Interrater reliability

Access via:
`system.file("extdata", "filename.csv", package = "meddecide")`

## Citation

If you use meddecide in your research, please cite the main ClinicoPath
project:

    Serdar Balci (2025). ClinicoPath jamovi Module. doi:10.5281/zenodo.3997188
    [R package]. Retrieved from https://github.com/sbalci/ClinicoPathJamoviModule

# Package index

## All functions

- [`agreement()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/agreement.md)
  : Interrater Reliability
- [`agreementClass`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/agreementClass.md)
  : Interrater Reliability Analysis
- [`auc_ci()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/auc_ci.md)
  : Statistical Utility Functions
- [`bayesdca_test_data`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/bayesdca_test_data.md)
  : Bayesian DCA test dataset
- [`bootstrapIDI()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/bootstrapIDI.md)
  : Bootstrap IDI calculation with confidence intervals
- [`bootstrapNRI()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/bootstrapNRI.md)
  : Bootstrap NRI calculation with confidence intervals
- [`bootstrap_ci()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/bootstrap_ci.md)
  : Bootstrap confidence intervals for diagnostic metrics
- [`breast_cancer_data`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/breast_cancer_data.md)
  : Breast cancer diagnostic dataset
- [`breast_data`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/breast_data.md)
  : Breast pathology diagnostic styles dataset
- [`calculateCEAC()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/calculateCEAC.md)
  : Calculate Cost-Effectiveness Acceptability Curve (CEAC)
- [`calculateEVPI()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/calculateEVPI.md)
  : Calculate Expected Value of Perfect Information (EVPI)
- [`calculate_auc()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/calculate_auc.md)
  : Calculate AUC from sensitivity and specificity
- [`calculate_nlr()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/calculate_nlr.md)
  : Calculate negative likelihood ratio
- [`calculate_npv()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/calculate_npv.md)
  : Calculate negative predictive value (NPV)
- [`calculate_plr()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/calculate_plr.md)
  : Calculate positive likelihood ratio
- [`calculate_ppv()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/calculate_ppv.md)
  : Calculate positive predictive value (PPV)
- [`calculate_sensitivity()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/calculate_sensitivity.md)
  : Calculate diagnostic sensitivity
- [`calculate_specificity()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/calculate_specificity.md)
  : Calculate diagnostic specificity
- [`cancer_data`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/cancer_data.md)
  : Cancer diagnostic dataset
- [`cardiac_data`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/cardiac_data.md)
  : Cardiac diagnostic dataset
- [`clear_error_log()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/clear_error_log.md)
  : Clear Error Log
- [`clinicopath_cleanup()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/clinicopath_cleanup.md)
  : Function Cleanup
- [`clinicopath_error_handler()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/clinicopath_error_handler.md)
  : ClinicoPath Error Handler
- [`clinicopath_init()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/clinicopath_init.md)
  : Initialize ClinicoPath Error Handling System
- [`clinicopath_startup_message()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/clinicopath_startup_message.md)
  : Package startup message
- [`clinicopath_warning_handler()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/clinicopath_warning_handler.md)
  : ClinicoPath Warning Handler
- [`computeNRI()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/computeNRI.md)
  : Compute Net Reclassification Index (NRI)
- [`cotest()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/cotest.md)
  : Co-Testing Analysis
- [`cotestClass`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/cotestClass.md)
  : Co-Testing Analysis
- [`createDecisionTreePlot()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/createDecisionTreePlot.md)
  : Create Decision Tree Plot
- [`createSafeHTMLContent()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/createSafeHTMLContent.md)
  : Create Error-Safe HTML Content
- [`create_enhanced_result()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/create_enhanced_result.md)
  : Enhanced Result Structure
- [`decision()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/decision.md)
  : Medical Decision
- [`decisionClass`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/decisionClass.md)
  : Medical Decision Analysis
- [`decisioncalculator()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/decisioncalculator.md)
  : Medical Decision Calculator
- [`decisioncalculatorClass`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/decisioncalculatorClass.md)
  : Decision Calculator
- [`decisioncombine()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/decisioncombine.md)
  : Combine Medical Decision Tests
- [`decisioncombineClass`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/decisioncombineClass.md)
  : Combine Medical Decision Tests
- [`decisioncompare()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/decisioncompare.md)
  : Compare Medical Decision Tests
- [`decisioncompareClass`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/decisioncompareClass.md)
  : Compare Medical Decision Tests
- [`.calculate2x2Metrics()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-calculate2x2Metrics.md)
  : Comprehensive 2x2 Diagnostic Metrics Calculator
- [`.calculateAccuracy()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-calculateAccuracy.md)
  : Calculate Accuracy
- [`.calculateDOR()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-calculateDOR.md)
  : Calculate Diagnostic Odds Ratio
- [`.calculateF1Score()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-calculateF1Score.md)
  : Calculate F1 Score (Harmonic Mean of Precision and Recall)
- [`.calculateLRMinus()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-calculateLRMinus.md)
  : Calculate Negative Likelihood Ratio
- [`.calculateLRPlus()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-calculateLRPlus.md)
  : Calculate Positive Likelihood Ratio
- [`.calculateMCC()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-calculateMCC.md)
  : Calculate Matthews Correlation Coefficient
- [`.calculateNPV()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-calculateNPV.md)
  : Calculate Negative Predictive Value
- [`.calculatePPV()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-calculatePPV.md)
  : Calculate Positive Predictive Value (Precision)
- [`.calculateSensitivity()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-calculateSensitivity.md)
  : Calculate Sensitivity (True Positive Rate)
- [`.calculateSpecificity()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-calculateSpecificity.md)
  : Calculate Specificity (True Negative Rate)
- [`.calculateYouden()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-calculateYouden.md)
  : Calculate Youden's J Index
- [`.clinicopath_errors`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-clinicopath_errors.md)
  : ClinicoPath Enhanced Error Handling Framework
- [`.formatDiagnosticTable()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-formatDiagnosticTable.md)
  : Format Diagnostic Metrics Table for Display
- [`.interpretDOR()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-interpretDOR.md)
  : Interpret Diagnostic Odds Ratio
- [`.interpretLR()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-interpretLR.md)
  : Interpret Likelihood Ratio Values
- [`.sensitivityCI()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-sensitivityCI.md)
  : Calculate Confidence Interval for Sensitivity
- [`.specificityCI()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/dot-specificityCI.md)
  : Calculate Confidence Interval for Specificity
- [`enhancedROC()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/enhancedROC.md)
  : Clinical ROC Analysis
- [`enhancedROCClass`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/enhancedROCClass.md)
  : Enhanced ROC Analysis Class
- [`generate_user_friendly_error()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/generate_user_friendly_error.md)
  : Generate User-Friendly Error Message
- [`generate_user_friendly_warning()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/generate_user_friendly_warning.md)
  : Generate User-Friendly Warning Message
- [`get_clinical_context()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/get_clinical_context.md)
  : Clinical Context Wrapper
- [`get_error_summary()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/get_error_summary.md)
  : Get Error Summary
- [`histopathology`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/histopathology.md)
  : Histopathology example dataset
- [`is_in_range()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/is_in_range.md)
  : Check if value is within valid range
- [`kappaSizeCI()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/kappaSizeCI.md)
  : Confidence Interval Approach for the Number of Subjects Required
- [`kappaSizeCIClass`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/kappaSizeCIClass.md)
  : Confidence Interval Approach for the Number of Subjects Required
- [`kappaSizeFixedN()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/kappaSizeFixedN.md)
  : Lowest Expected Value for a fixed sample size
- [`kappaSizeFixedNClass`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/kappaSizeFixedNClass.md)
  : Lowest Expected Value for a fixed sample size
- [`kappaSizePower()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/kappaSizePower.md)
  : Power Approach for the Number of Subjects Required
- [`kappaSizePowerClass`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/kappaSizePowerClass.md)
  : Power Approach for the Number of Subjects Required
- [`load_required_package()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/load_required_package.md)
  : Check whether a required package is available
- [`lymphoma_data`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/lymphoma_data.md)
  : Lymphoma diagnostic styles dataset
- [`master_data`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/master_data.md)
  : Master dataset collection
- [`meddecide-package`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/meddecide-package.md)
  [`meddecide`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/meddecide-package.md)
  : Functions for Medical Decision Making in ClinicoPath jamovi Module
- [`nogoldstandard()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/nogoldstandard.md)
  : Analysis Without Gold Standard
- [`nomogrammer()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/nomogrammer.md)
  : Fagan Nomogram for Diagnostic Test Analysis
- [`performMonteCarloSimulation()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/performMonteCarloSimulation.md)
  : Perform Monte Carlo Simulation for PSA (Deprecated)
- [`print(`*`<sensSpecTable>`*`)`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/print.sensSpecTable.md)
  : Format HTML table for sensitivity/specificity results
- [`prop_to_percent()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/prop_to_percent.md)
  : Convert proportion to percentage string
- [`psychopdaROC()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/psychopdaROC.md)
  : Advanced ROC Analysis
- [`psychopdaROCClass`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/psychopdaROCClass.md)
  : Comprehensive ROC Analysis with Advanced Features
- [`raw_to_prob()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/raw_to_prob.md)
  : Convert raw test values to predicted probabilities using ROC curve
- [`safe_divide()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/safe_divide.md)
  : Safe division function
- [`safe_execute()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/safe_execute.md)
  : Safe Execution Wrapper
- [`sepsis_data`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/sepsis_data.md)
  : Sepsis diagnostic dataset
- [`sequentialtests()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/sequentialtests.md)
  : Sequential Testing Analysis
- [`sequentialtestsClass`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/sequentialtestsClass.md)
  : Sequential Testing Analysis
- [`thyroid_data`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/thyroid_data.md)
  : Thyroid diagnostic dataset
- [`thyroid_function_data`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/thyroid_function_data.md)
  : Thyroid function test dataset
- [`validateDecisionAnalysisInputs()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/validateDecisionAnalysisInputs.md)
  : Validate Decision Analysis Inputs
- [`validateROCInputs()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/validateROCInputs.md)
  : Validate inputs for ROC analysis
- [`validate_clinical_data()`](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/reference/validate_clinical_data.md)
  : Validate Data with Clinical Context

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [MedDecide 01: Introduction to Medical Decision Analysis for
  Pathologists](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/01-introduction.md):
- [meddecide: Medical Decision Making in
  R](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/02-comprehensive-guide.md):
- [Advanced Features in Interrater Agreement
  Analysis](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/03-agreement-advanced-features.md):
- [Inter-Rater Agreement and Reliability Analysis in
  Pathology](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/03-agreement-analysis.md):
- [ROC Curve
  Analysis](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/03-roc-analysis.md):
- [Medical Decision Tree - Clinical Implementation
  Guide](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/04-decision-tree-guide.md):
- [Decision Tree Graph Analysis: Comprehensive Guide and
  Testing](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/05-decision-tree-analysis.md):
- [Decision Tree vs Markov Chain Analysis: Complete
  Guide](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/06-decision-tree-vs-markov.md):
- [Jamovi Workflow Examples for Decision Tree and Markov
  Analysis](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/06-jamovi-workflow-examples.md):
- [Bayesian Decision Curve Analysis - Advanced Clinical Decision
  Making](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/07-bayesian-decision-curve-analysis.md):
- [Decision Tree and Markov Chain Analysis
  Examples](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/07-decision-trees.md):
- [Sample Size Calculations for Interobserver Agreement
  Studies](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/07-kappasizeci-comprehensive.md):
- [Clinical Applications of Decision Panel
  Optimization](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/08-decision-panel-clinical.md):
- [Complete Guide to kappasizefixedn: Fixed Sample Size Kappa Power
  Analysis](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/08-kappasizefixedn-comprehensive.md):
- [Advanced Features and Customization in Decision Panel
  Optimization](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/09-decision-panel-advanced.md):
- [Complete Guide to kappasizepower: Power Analysis for Inter-rater
  Agreement
  Studies](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/09-kappasizepower-comprehensive.md):
- [Introduction to Decision Panel
  Optimization](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/10-decision-panel-optimization.md):
- [Precision Oncology: Biomarker-Guided Treatment Selection and Outcome
  Analysis](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/11-precision-oncology.md):
- [Analyzing Diagnostic Tests without a Gold
  Standard](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/12-nogoldstandard.md):
- [Diagnostic Test
  Evaluation](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/13-diagnostic-tests.md):
- [Quick Guide: Diagnostic Style Clustering in
  jamovi](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/14-diagnostic-style-quick-guide.md):
- [Diagnostic Style Clustering: Identifying Pathologist 'Schools' and
  Diagnostic
  Preferences](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/15-diagnostic-style-clustering.md):
- [Use meddecide in
  R](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/16-use-in-r.md):
- [meddecide: Introduction to Medical Decision
  Analysis](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/17-introduction-legacy.md):
- [ROC Curve
  Analysis](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/18-roc-analysis-legacy.md):
- [Advanced Features and Customization in Decision Panel
  Optimization](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/19-decisionpanel-advanced-legacy.md):
- [Clinical Applications of Decision Panel
  Optimization](https://www.serdarbalci.com/meddecide/articles/20-decisionpanel-clinical-legacy.md):
